features: Instant Odour Elimination: Neutralises unpleasant odours on contact, whether from food, pets, smoke, or bins. No masking with heavy fragrances, just fast and effective freshness.

Scientifically Proven Formula: Developed with over 50 active ingredients, Neutradol’s formula actively breaks down and neutralises odour molecules at the source leaving behind truly clean, breathable air.
Versatile for Any Room: From bathrooms and kitchens to hallways, offices, and pet areas, this powerful aerosol is perfect for instantly refreshing any space in your home or workplace.
Naturally Fresh Scent: Infused with a clean, crisp scent that uplifts your space without overwhelming it.
Easy to Use Spray: Designed for convenience and control. A few quick bursts are all it takes to provide long lasting freshness, whenever and wherever you need it.
